item.description: Structured FAQ documentation for CourseCorrect covering general questions, account access, features, pricing, privacy, and technical support.

item.description: Professional API documentation with quick start guide, endpoint reference, and code examples for developers

item.title: User Guide - CourseCorrect
item.description: Comprehensive user guide covering account setup, features, workflows, troubleshooting, FAQ, and contact center for CourseCorrect platform

item.title: RESUME
item.description:
EXPERIENCE

Stakeholder Relations (Internship)
PT Angkasa Pura Indonesia – Yogyakarta International Airport
September 2024 – December 2024 | onsite

  • Collaborated with SME to translate and localize technical e-book on airport architectural design, adapting complex terminology for English readers.
  • Contributed content to official airport bulletin publication (2nd edition, 2025).
  • Developed a monthly content calendar for social media.
  • Tracked and classified media sentiment related to airport operations.

EDUCATION

Jenderal Soedirman University
Associate’s Degree - English Language
2022 – 2025
GPA: 3.74/4.00

item.title: Rumination
item.description: One of a series of mind

item.title: How I am Jumping into Technical Writing With Zero Tech Background
item.description: Building my technical writing portfolio from scratch while battling my imposter syndrome.

item.title: Understanding GPU Benchmark Numbers: What 60 FPS Actually Means
item.description: You’re staring at GPU benchmarks showing “85 FPS” and “127 FPS” - but what do these numbers actually mean for your gaming? Here’s how to decode those performance figures.

item.title: ABOUT
item.description: Get to know me a bit
